pom.xml.general_idea: Bump the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Update Kotlin compiler and standard library to a version compatible with JDK 21.
Bump kotlinx-coroutines to a version supporting the new JDK target.
Bump kotlinx-datetime to a version compatible with the updated Kotlin/JDK stack.
Update Trixnity framework to a version compatible with JDK 21.
Bump Ktor to a patch version ensuring stability on the new JDK.
Update Koin dependency injection framework to a compatible version.
Bump Okio library to a version compatible with the new JDK.
Update Nimbus JOSE+JWT library to a version supporting JDK 21.
Bump Exposed ORM to a version compatible with the new JDK.
Update PostgreSQL JDBC driver to a version supporting JDK 21.
Bump Logback to a version compatible with JDK 21.
Update Kotest testing framework to a version compatible with JDK 21.
Bump Mockk mocking library to a version supporting JDK 21.
Update JUnit 5 to a version compatible with JDK 21.
Bump SLF4J API to a version compatible with JDK 21.
Replace Apache and Java HTTP clients with OkHttp client for Ktor, likely for better JDK 21 compatibility or performance.
Add Ktor server status pages plugin for better error handling.
Add Kotest JSON assertions for improved testing capabilities.
Add Kotest Ktor assertions for improved testing capabilities.
Introduce OpenAPI generator plugin to auto-generate Kotlin models from YAML specs.
Configure Kotlin compiler to include generated sources from OpenAPI generator.
Add a Maven profile for release builds including assembly and test skipping.
Add a Maven profile to enforce license headers and third-party reports.
Bump Maven Surefire plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
Bump JaCoCo plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
Add Maven Enforcer plugin to enforce build rules like no snapshots.
Update license-maven-plugin to a newer version.
Add build-helper-maven-plugin to assist with timestamp properties for license headers.
Configure maven-release-plugin to skip tests during release.
Update project version, URL, inception year, and organization details.
Update copyright year range in the POM header.
Update the main class property to reflect package renaming.
Remove explicit kotlinx-serialization-core dependency as it might be managed differently or redundant.
Remove explicit kotlin-serialization dependency from dependencies block, likely handled by plugin.
Update SCM tag to the new release version.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the Docker base image from Eclipse Temurin 17 to 21 to align with the target JDK version.
Update the copied JAR filename and entrypoint argument to match the new build artifact name.
Replace the compact license header with a standard multi-line Apache 2.0 license block including updated copyright years.

README.md.general_idea: Change the Maven command in the README from 'package' to 'install' to ensure the artifact is installed to the local repository for Docker image creation.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Modernize the Apache License header format and update the copyright year range.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Replaced single-line license text with multi-line standard block and updated year to 2023 - 2025.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Remove the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml to align with modern Compose specification standards.
Ensure the messenger-proxy service starts only after the database is healthy, preventing connection errors during startup.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Changed 'depends_on: - db' to 'depends_on: db: condition: service_healthy'.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Reduce the interval and timeout for the messenger-proxy database health check to speed up container readiness detection.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Changed healthcheck interval from 10s to 3s and timeout from 3s to 2s.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add environment variables for a test user in the Synapse service to support testing scenarios.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added SYNAPSE_TEST_USER and SYNAPSE_TEST_PASSWORD environment variables.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Ensure the Synapse service starts only after its database is healthy, preventing connection errors during startup.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Changed 'depends_on: - synapse-db' to 'depends_on: synapse-db: condition: service_healthy'.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Reduce the interval and timeout for the Synapse database health check to speed up container readiness detection.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Changed healthcheck interval from 10s to 3s and timeout from 3s to 2s.

http/ActuatorApi.http.general_idea: Corrected the package path in the HTTP request to reflect the removal of the 'timref' segment from the package name.

src/main/resources/app/resources/applica.general_idea: Modernize the Apache License header to include a date range and company URL.
src/main/resources/app/resources/applica.human_impl: Replaced single-line license comment with multi-line block including 'Copyright © 2023 - 2025 akquinet GmbH (https://www.akquinet.de)'

src/main/resources/app/resources/applica.general_idea: Add a configurable update interval for the federation list cache.
Introduce configuration for the TIM authorization check concept and invite rejection policy.
Modernized the Apache License header to include a date range and proper formatting.
src/main/resources/app/resources/applica.human_impl: Replaced single-line license text with multi-line standard Apache 2.0 header including copyright years 2023-2025.

src/main/resources/app/resources/applica.general_idea: Added a configuration property for the federation list cache update interval.
Changed the homeserver URL to use the Docker service name instead of host.docker.internal for better container networking compatibility.
Added configuration for the authorization concept regarding invite events.
Modernize the Apache License header to include a date range and proper formatting.
src/main/resources/app/resources/applica.human_impl: Replaced single-line license text with multi-line standard Apache 2.0 header including copyright year range 2023-2025.

src/main/resources/app/resources/applica.general_idea: Configure the federation list cache to update periodically.
src/main/resources/app/resources/applica.human_impl: Added 'updateIntervalMinutes: 1' to the federationListCache configuration block.

src/main/resources/app/resources/applica.general_idea: Introduce configuration for the invite event authorization concept.
src/main/resources/app/resources/applica.human_impl: Added 'timAuthorizationCheckConfiguration' block with 'concept: CLIENT' and 'inviteRejectionPolicy: ALLOW_ALL'.

src/main/resources/db/migration/V1__cont.general_idea: Removed the Apache License 2.0 header comment block from the SQL migration file.
src/main/resources/db/migration/V1__cont.human_impl: Deleted lines 1-6 containing the copyright and license text.

src/main/resources/db/migration/V2__cont.general_idea: Removed the Apache License 2.0 header comment from the SQL migration file.
src/main/resources/db/migration/V2__cont.human_impl: Deleted lines 1-6 containing the copyright and license text.

src/test/resources/logback-test.xml.general_idea: Modernize the copyright notice format and extend the year range to 2025.
src/test/resources/logback-test.xml.human_impl: Replaced block comment style with updated text including '2023 - 2025' and URL.

src/test/resources/logback-test.xml.general_idea: Update the logger name to reflect a package rename from 'timref' to 'tim'.
